product_name: Real Mini Camera – Original Style Digital Keychain Camera

bullets: A trendy mini digital camera, ideal for capturing everyday moments with one click. Compact and colorful, it fits anywhere thanks to its miniature size and built-in key ring, perfect for hanging on a bag or a bunch of keys. Comes with a 1GB memory card, to keep photos and videos always within reach. Support SD card up to 64GB

Ultra-compact and ultra-light, this miniature camera is the perfect companion to capture every precious moment. Easy to put in a pocket or hang on a bag thanks to its integrated key ring, it impresses with its modern and colorful design. The perfect accessory to add a touch of style to everyday life, while capturing memories with originality wherever you are.
Original, Retro, Instant, Compact, Pro and Vintage. Discover 6 unique models!

Front Lens / 0.96 inch Color LCD Screen / 6 Frames and 8 Color Filters Included / Built-in Flash / Compatible Storage Support: 1 x 1GB Micro SD Card Included / Built-in Rechargeable Battery, USB-C Cable Included / Compatible with Computers, Laptops and Tablets with USB Port.
Contents: 1 Mini Digital Camera, 1 Keyring clip, 1 1GB Micro SD Card, 1 USB-C Charging Cable and user manual. Recommended for girls and boys aged 8 and up
content.description: Hours of fun and creativity to discover among 6 models of ultra-trendy Mini'Cam! Ideal for capturing everyday moments, this mini digital camera allows you to customize photos and videos with 6 frames and 8 built-in color filters. Ultra-compact, it fits easily into a pocket or hangs on a bag thanks to its practical key ring. Comes with a 1GB micro-SD card to keep your creations always at hand, and simply transfer them to a computer, tablet or other device via the included USB-C cable. Developed in France, this device is designed for children from 8 years old, in compliance with European toy standards. Its ergonomic shape and intuitive buttons allow for easy grip, ideal for everyday use.

attributes.whats_in_box: 1 Mini Digital Camera, 1 Keyring clip, 1 1GB Micro SD Card, 1 USB-C Charging Cable and user manual.
